title: BSP v5p3x CSDC and threshold audit
observations: BSP v5p3x writes REG_CSDC to select CRC detect parameters for HS400 vs other timings.
REG_CSDC is timing/CRC policy, not an IDMAC descriptor memory access control.
BSP read threshold is enabled only for selected high-speed read timings.
The local diagnostic branch already enables read threshold for the failing read path, so it is not missing the BSP threshold write.
reason: CSDC and threshold policy do not explain IDMAC entering descriptor-read state with DLBA set while descriptor word 0 remains unconsumed.
next: Do not retest CSDC or read-threshold policy as descriptor-fetch fixes without new evidence.
